template_text: Patient presents with {symptoms}. Platelet count {platelet_count} indicates severity. IV fluids required for hydration. Monitoring essential for {duration} hours.
Critical dengue with {complications}. Platelet transfusion indicated as count dropped to {platelet_count}. ICU admission mandatory for {icu_days} days.
